prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 3S-GTE (Gen 3, 2.0L turbo) from a JDM Toyota Caldina GT-T (engine code: 3S-GTE), paired with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft set for high-RPM power delivery. Fuel system upgraded with Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors and a Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump, controlled via a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel capability.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a JDM Toyota Celica GT-Four (ST205) 6-speed manual transmission, upgraded with a PPG close-ratio gear set (2.92, 2.05, 1.54, 1.21, 1.00, 0.86) and a Cusco Type-RS twin-plate clutch. Differential upgraded to a KAAZ 2-way mechanical LSD with 4.444 final gear ratio for aggressive acceleration.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Cavalier’s 4-lug hub pattern), paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear). Braking system upgraded to Endless CC-RG6 6-pot front calipers with 330mm rotors and 4-pot rear calipers with 310mm rotors, using Ferodo DS2500 pads for track endurance.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (specific to the Cavalier’s 5th-gen J-body platform), with custom carbon fiber overfenders and a vented hood (Seibon Carbon) for heat extraction. Rear diffuser integrated with a custom dual-exit exhaust system (custom 3.5-inch piping with Burns Stainless mufflers).

JDM-spec Toyota Cavalier (Chevrolet Cavalier rebadge) front bumper lip (OEM Toyota part #53111-20010) paired with a custom carbon fiber splitter (Aero Catch canards for high-speed stability). Side skirts replaced with Vertex Lang II-style carbon fiber units, color-matched to the body in Toyota Super White II (code 040).

Wheel setup: Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +22 front and 17x10 +30 rear (ET adjusted for Cavalier fender clearance), wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear). Interior stripped and reinforced with a Cusco bolt-in roll cage (8-point, chromoly), Sparco Pro 2000 seats, and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub.
